title: viola exsul
intro: Viola exsul, also known as wild pansy or heartsease, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The health benefits of Viola exsul include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Viola exsul can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
